label: Unity 6.3 breaking: UnityEngine.Experimental.* namespaces removed -- move to non-Experimental equivalents
Unity 6.3 breaking: [SerializeField] on auto-properties now requires [field: SerializeField] syntax
Unity 6.3 breaking: URP compatibility mode render graph calls removed -- migrate to full render graph API
Unity 6.3 breaking: UnityEngine.Rendering.Universal compatibility-mode APIs removed -- use ScriptableRenderPass
Unity 6.3 breaking: OnTriggerEnter/OnCollisionEnter signatures unified -- use Collider and Collision overloads
Unity 6.3 breaking: Input.GetAxis and legacy Input system deprecated -- migrate to InputSystem package
Unity 6.3 breaking: WWW class fully removed -- use UnityWebRequest or UnityWebRequestTexture
Unity 6.3 breaking: Several EditorGUILayout.* methods have new optional parameters; calls missing args may break
Unity 6.3 breaking: Direct Mesh.vertices assignment deprecated -- use Mesh.SetVertices(List<Vector3>) instead
Unity 6.3 breaking: AssetDatabase.Refresh(ImportAssetOptions.ForceUpdate) behavior changed -- Default is now preferred
Unity 6.3 breaking: Physics2D OnTriggerEnter2D/OnCollisionEnter2D now require non-null Collider2D checks
Unity 6.3 breaking: Several ShaderGraph nodes renamed or removed -- check migration guide in Package Manager
